items.comment: Todo: "Clubs aren't sharp. Dirks are small, it could sneak through."
items.text: So use a club? Or a dirk?

"Swordbound" doesn't mean just swords.
It stops any kind of intent to attack.

items.comment: Todo: "push them sternly with my fist."
items.text:
I could somewhat punch them.
